feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Goods Receipt of a material
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we do goods receipt of a material for an existing equipment does the equipment need to be in store?

Thanks & Regards,

Preethi

entry.title: Conditions to do GR of an existing equipment for a material
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Other than refurbishment under what conditions do we do goods receipt of an existing equipment for a material?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: Status of equipment after GR
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we do goods receipt of an equipment for a material can the equipment directly have the status AVLB?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: IP10 Maintenance schedule plan process
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are currently facing issue in IP10 transaction while scheduling maintenance plans. 
When the start date of call is in previous year, we could see system is creating calls from previous year. But the calls are getting creted based on scheduling period and it is taking current year as basis and scheduling calls.
This is causing calls scheduled even after End date of scheduling as calls are getting started from current year.

For example, 

For below we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2028. But as scheduling period is 3YR, system is considering current year 2025 3 which is till 2028 to schedule calls.

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 3 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

In the below case, we could see calls are scheduled form 2023 to 2031. But as scheduling period is 6YR, system is considering current year 2025 6 which is till 2031 to schedule calls. But as end date of scheduling is 2031, business are expecting no calls after 2030 (end date of scheduling). 

Call Horizon      : 30 Day
Scheduling period : 6 YR
Cycle             : 12 MO and 6 MO
Start of cycle    : 01.01.2023
End date for sch. : 31.12.2030
Strategy          : FTMA05

Please let us know if the above is standard behavior. If yes, We need your inputs on how to setup the calls to consider the start of cycle date (not the current date) and  to stop the calls at the end date of scheduling.

entry.title: Work orders created from maintenance plans with high estimated cost.
entry.content: I rescheduled multiple maintenance plans together in SAP which created many work orders at once as expected, but all these newly created Work orders were created with extremely inflated / high estimated cost, please help me understand how to fix this?

entry.title: SAP Business User Guide in English
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community Members,

I hope you're all doing well! I’m currently working on a project involving SAP S/4HANA and am looking for the latest SAP S/4HANA Business User Guide (in English) to better understand the standard business processes and functionalities from a user perspective. If anyone has access to this document or can guide me on where I can officially download it, I would greatly appreciate your support.

Thanks in advance for your time and help!

Best regards,
Sarvan Kumar

entry.title: Queries related to QS41
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If there are different entries in QS41 in the test environment and production environment as we can do direct entries in production, if we add/remove certain entries in the lower environment and transport it to production will the data be overwritten or only the changes captured in the TR will be moved to production?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: Stock data of serial number XXXXXXX not suitable for movement Message No. IO231
entry.content:
Hi Team,

When we do a goods receipt of an existing serialized material with equipment status AVLB and the serial level 1 is checked in the material master we get a warning message during check Stock data of serial number XXXXXXX not suitable for movement Message No. IO231 and during posting an ABAP dump is thrown.

But for the above scenario if we remove the serial level 1 we don't get any ABAP dump during posting. Why so?

Regards,

Priti

entry.title: Data Necessidade IW32
entry.content: Na transação IW32 na aba componentes preciso habilitar o campo data de necessidade para preenchimento manual na primeira tela, não sendo necessário selecionar o item do material e ir na guia Dados Gerais.

entry.title: Changes in work order propagated to released PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,

If we change certain details in the work order like purchase organization will the same be propagated in the purchase order. If so how?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: IE02 Merkmale vervielfacht
entry.content:
unsere Medizintechnik hat gemeldet, dass nach dem Einspielen des Patches ein Fehler aufgefallen ist. Interessanterweise tritt dieser jedoch nicht in allen Geräten auf, was ungewöhnlich erscheint. Zum Vergleich habe ich identische Geräte in unseren ERK/ERP  und SB2 (hier wurde kein Patch installiert) überprüft, und dabei Folgendes festgestellt:

Im Gerät z. B. 3060235 EQ IE02 im gepatchten ERK/ERP unter Klassenübersicht der Merkmalbezeichnung zeigt im Tab „Allgemein“ den Wert 232 Stück

(die Werte wiederholen sich!) und im Tab „IT-Daten“ 109, wobei zusätzliche leere Felder vorhanden sind. Also es gibt unter Merkmalsbezeichnung mehr Einträge als vor dem letzten Patch. Bei IT-Daten gibt es dann leere Felder. Die Anwender sagen sie hätten keine Merkmale hinzugefügt

entry.title: open transfer documents
entry.content: I am finding instances where an old stock transfer in transit is preventing a PR from triggering to replenish stock. I have checked the Material Documents List tile and the Material Documents Overview tile to see if any open transfer documents exist for any plants, but not seeing anything. Usually, an open transfer that is not received would show in the material documents list for a material as 303.

entry.title: Data not saved outside enhancement tab in work order
entry.content:
Please advise on why the insert/change in data made in the Enhancement Tab for IW32 is not being saved if “Save” button is clicked on the other tabs outside of the Enhancement Tab. Is it possible to have an auto-populate logic on the field that is in Enhancement Tab without going to the Enhancement Tab.


Currently, we have a custom field called LAFD and it sits in the Enhancement Tab. This field does not get updated when the enhancement tab is not accessed before saving the order.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Help Needed:Function Module for Creating Work Center with Person/Position Assignment (IR01) W/o BDCs
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We are currently working on automating the creation of Work Centers using transaction IR01 in SAP. As part of this process, we also need to assign Persons or Positions (HR objects) to the Work Center.

Instead of using BDC (Batch Data Communication), we are looking for a function module or BAPI that can handle both the creation of the Work Center and the assignment of Persons/Positions to it in a clean and reliable way.

Has anyone implemented this kind of functionality before? If so, could you please share:

  • The function module(s) or BAPI(s) used

  • Any prerequisites or tips to be aware of

  • How the assignment to HR objects (Persons/Positions) was handled

Your input would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: In 'Manage Teams and Responsibilities' app while trying to add Performing Work Center, F4 value help
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In 'Manage Teams and Responsibilities' app while trying to add Performing Work Center, F4 value help is not working( Error: No authorization to access value help for PerformingWorkCtr. Please define conditions.).

And if I try to add it manually I am getting error 'Enter the numeric work center ID or choose it from the value help.'. What might be the issue? Am I missing some config?

Please guide.

Thanks,

Sumanta M

entry.title: Which signavio best practices apply to plant maintenance without phase model
entry.content:
Team 

We have best practices for Phase model 4HH etc but which best practices apply for customers using classical model in private cloud.

While going through bh1 corrective maint we don't see the fiori apps such as maintenance planning overview and perform maint jobs in test scripts .  Wanted to know which best practice scenario can be used to accurately demo a classical model approach using latest fiori approach.

Thanks

entry.title: Cost center budgeting for eam order
entry.content:
Team

We have cost center budgeting but that doesn't seem to be integrated with eam order for active availability check. Is there any feature coming in future scope 

Thanks

Gaurav

entry.title: Situation handling in eam
entry.content:
Team

Do we need a licence to use situation handling and is this a configurable product by functional consultants or do we need technical expertise to configure scenarios e.g if too many work orders are pending release for x days we need alerts etc?

Are there existing std eam available situation handling scenarios in the roadmap to implement as standard product  thanks

entry.title: Investment order and asset creation
entry.content:
Team

With pm investment order we can create a single asset but there are scenarios where an investment can lead to creation or update of a small asset hierarchy e.g installing 5 pumps in a single location or rebuilding . In existing scenario there is no provision to create or update a asset hierarchy from within work order or on technical completion of work order .               Is there any roadmap for a greater integration 

 The process involves creation of floc and equipment seperately as of now

Thanks

entry.title: Aquire to decomission process
entry.content: Team for aquire to decomission process which is the start point apart from manual approvals and budgeting , is purchase requisition with account assignment assets the start point ? and how can eam work order process be integrated at what point in time since the asset procurement is being done at company level and we cannot raise purchase requisitions from work order to just to procure so many assets. Do we have an integrated best practice document which displays flow right from planning to procurement to commision.?
